title: dryopteris davallioides
intro: Dryopteris davallioides is a species of fern belonging to the Dryopteridaceae family, native to Japan and parts of Asia. It is also known as the 'Davall's fern' and is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Dryopteris davallioides include its potential to alleviate fever, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Dryopteris davallioides is traditionally prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal and health benefits, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
